qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Regex DoS (ReDoS) in LiveQuery via $regex operator when regexTimeout is disabled
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes a ReDoS vulnerability via catastrophic backtracking regex patterns in LiveQuery subscriptions. This is unrelated to the advisory's prototype chain resolution vulnerability, which involves Object.prototype property lookup during Cloud Function dispatch. Different root cause, different vulnerable code paths, different vulnerability class (CWE-1333 vs CWE-1321).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unsafe deserialization in import endpoint permits attacker-controlled code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes an unsafe deserialization vulnerability in an import workflow leading to RCE. This is unrelated to the advisory's prototype chain resolution vulnerability affecting Cloud Function dispatch. Different vulnerable component (import endpoint vs Cloud Function handler), different root cause (unsafe deserialization vs prototype property resolution), different vulnerability class.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding matches the advisory-described prototype chain resolution vulnerability. The advisory describes a vulnerability where calling Cloud Function endpoints with prototype property names (e.g., __proto__, constructor) causes infinite recursion or dispatch bypass via Object.prototype property resolution. The two qualifying findings are unrelated vulnerabilities: one is ReDoS via regex patterns in LiveQuery, the other is deserialization RCE in an import endpoint. Neither involves prototype pollution, Object.prototype property lookup, or Cloud Function dispatch logic.
evidence: Advisory describes prototype chain resolution in Cloud Function dispatch: 'calling a Cloud Function endpoint with a prototype property name as the function name'
Advisory root cause: 'internal handler registries for Cloud Functions, Jobs, Triggers, and Validators have been changed to prevent prototype chain properties from being resolved'
Advisory CVE: CWE-1321 (Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes)
livequery-redos-regex-timeout finding: ReDoS via catastrophic backtracking regex in LiveQuery subscriptions, unrelated to prototype properties
example finding: Deserialization RCE in import endpoint, unrelated to Cloud Function dispatch or prototype resolution
